# US-002: Manage developer profiles with shareable access link - Implementation Plan

**Generated by:** Archetipo Planning Team
**Date:** 2026-05-06

---

## User Story

**Epic:** EP-001 - Sprint & Backlog Management
**Priority:** HIGH | **Story Points:** 3

**Story**
As Valentina, I want to create, edit, and delete developer profiles (name, role, seniority) and receive a unique shareable URL for each, so that I can onboard each team member with a single link they can open without signing up.

**Acceptance Criteria**
- [ ] User can create a profile with name, role (frontend/backend), and seniority (junior/senior)
- [ ] On creation, a unique URL containing a UUID v4 token is generated, displayed, and copyable
- [ ] The token (and resulting URL) remains stable across edits to name/role/seniority
- [ ] User can edit profile attributes
- [ ] Deleting a profile is a soft-delete: marked inactive, access URL stops working immediately, removed from task-assignment dropdowns; historical commitments, check-ins, and retrospectives remain intact
- [ ] User can regenerate the access token in one click; the old URL stops working immediately while the profile and its history remain intact
- [ ] All active profiles are listed in a management view, each showing its shareable URL; soft-deleted profiles are accessible from a separate "archived" view

---

## Technical Solution

We introduce a `DevProfile` Prisma model owned by the authenticated `User`, with a unique `accessToken` (UUID v4) generated server-side and an `isActive` flag for soft-delete. The protected page `/profiles` combines a creation form with a list of active profiles whose card exposes the copyable shareable URL; a separate `/profiles/archived` route shows soft-deleted profiles in read-only mode. All mutations go through Next.js server actions with shared Zod validation, reusing `getCurrentUser`, `prisma` singleton and shadcn/ui without adding new dependencies.

- **Prisma model `DevProfile`**: `id` (uuid), `ownerId` (FK `User`, cascade restrict), `name`, `role` (enum `frontend|backend`), `seniority` (enum `junior|senior`), `accessToken` (`@unique`, populated by `crypto.randomUUID()`), `isActive` (default `true`), `archivedAt` (nullable), `createdAt`, `updatedAt`. Index on `accessToken` for the future US-006 lookup. Apply via `npx prisma db push`.
- **Validation**: shared Zod schemas in `src/lib/validation/profile.ts` - `createProfileSchema` (name non-empty after trim, role and seniority on the enums) and `updateProfileSchema` (same fields, no token). Both server actions and client form consume the same schemas for consistent error messages.
- **Server actions** in `src/app/profiles/actions.ts`: `createProfileAction`, `updateProfileAction` (does NOT touch `accessToken`), `softDeleteProfileAction` (sets `isActive=false`, `archivedAt=now()`), `regenerateTokenAction` (sets `accessToken = crypto.randomUUID()`). All call `getCurrentUser()`, enforce ownership, and call `revalidatePath('/profiles')` (and `/profiles/archived` when applicable).
- **Token stability by design**: `accessToken` is written only by `create` and `regenerate`. The other mutations never pass it to Prisma, satisfying the stability AC structurally rather than via business rules.
- **Page `/profiles/page.tsx`** (server component): redirects to `/auth/signin` if unauthenticated, fetches the user's active profiles ordered by `createdAt desc`, renders `ProfileForm` and `ProfileList`. Each card shows name, role and seniority badges, the full shareable URL (`{origin}/dev/{token}`), and actions: Edit, Regenerate, Archive (each gated by a confirmation `Dialog` for destructive actions).
- **Page `/profiles/archived/page.tsx`**: read-only list of profiles with `isActive=false`, owned by the current user; the URL is hidden and no mutation actions are exposed.
- **Client components**: `ProfileForm` for create, `EditProfileDialog` for edit (shadcn `Dialog`), `ProfileCard` with a "Copy link" button using `navigator.clipboard.writeText` and a brief confirmation toast (existing `sonner`). Confirmation `Dialog`s for Regenerate and Archive surface explicit "this immediately invalidates the link" wording.
- **URL helper** `src/lib/profile.ts`: `buildDevUrl(token, origin)` centralises the `/dev/{token}` scheme so US-006 can reuse it; the `origin` is read server-side from request headers and passed as prop to client components to avoid hydration mismatches.
- **Token uniqueness retry**: `regenerateTokenAction` catches the Prisma `P2002` unique-constraint error and retries once with a fresh UUID before surfacing the failure - belt-and-braces against the (vanishingly small) collision probability.

---

## Test Strategy

We layer tests so each AC is verified at the most appropriate level: pure logic and validation unit-tested, persistence and ownership integration-tested, the user-visible flows e2e-tested. Token stability and revocation are explicitly verified to defend the security guarantee declared in the backlog.

- **Unit** - Zod schemas reject empty/whitespace name and invalid enums; update schema rejects any attempt to pass `accessToken`.
- **Unit** - `buildDevUrl` handles origin with and without trailing slash, encodes the token correctly.
- **Integration** - `createProfileAction` persists with a unique UUID v4 token, scoped to the current user; rejects unauthenticated calls.
- **Integration** - `updateProfileAction` mutates name/role/seniority but leaves `accessToken` unchanged; rejects cross-user updates.
- **Integration** - `regenerateTokenAction` produces a different token, preserves `id` and history relations, rejects cross-user calls.
- **Integration** - `softDeleteProfileAction` sets `isActive=false` and `archivedAt`, removes the profile from the active list, retains it in the archived list.
- **Integration** - `/profiles` page lists only active profiles owned by the current user; `/profiles/archived` lists only inactive ones owned by the current user.
- **E2E (Playwright)** - authenticated user creates a profile, copies the URL, edits the name and verifies the URL is unchanged, regenerates and verifies the URL changes, archives and verifies the profile moves to the archived view.
- **E2E (Playwright)** - unauthenticated visitor to `/profiles` is redirected to `/auth/signin`.
- **E2E (Playwright)** - validation errors (empty name) are shown inline and no profile is persisted.

---

## Implementation Tasks

| Status | # | Task | Description | Type | Dependencies |
|---|---|---|---|---|---|
| DONE | TASK-01 | Add `DevProfile` Prisma model | Define `DevProfile` and the `Role`/`Seniority` enums in `prisma/schema.prisma` with FK to `User`, run `prisma db push`, regenerate client. | Impl | - |
| DONE | TASK-02 | Create Zod validation schemas | Add `src/lib/validation/profile.ts` with `createProfileSchema` and `updateProfileSchema`. | Impl | TASK-01 |
| DONE | TASK-03 | Add `buildDevUrl` helper | Implement `src/lib/profile.ts` with the URL builder; pure function. | Impl | TASK-01 |
| DONE | TASK-04 | Unit tests for schemas and helper | Cover Zod edge cases and `buildDevUrl` origin/token handling. | Test | TASK-02, TASK-03 |
| DONE | TASK-05 | Implement profile server actions | `createProfileAction`, `updateProfileAction`, `softDeleteProfileAction`, `regenerateTokenAction` in `src/app/profiles/actions.ts` with auth, ownership, validation, retry on P2002, `revalidatePath`. | Impl | TASK-02 |
| SKIPPED | TASK-06 | Integration tests for server actions | Cover happy paths, ownership rejection, token stability on update, token rotation on regenerate, soft-delete state. | Test | TASK-05 |
| DONE | TASK-07 | Build `/profiles` page and `ProfileList` | Server component with auth redirect, fetch active profiles, pass `origin`, render cards with copy/edit/regenerate/archive actions. | Impl | TASK-03, TASK-05 |
| DONE | TASK-08 | Build `ProfileForm` and `EditProfileDialog` | shadcn-based create form and edit dialog wired to server actions with inline error display. | Impl | TASK-05, TASK-07 |
| DONE | TASK-09 | Build confirmation dialogs and copy-link UX | Regenerate and Archive confirm dialogs with destructive-action wording; "Copy link" button using `navigator.clipboard` with sonner toast. | Impl | TASK-07, TASK-08 |
| DONE | TASK-10 | Build `/profiles/archived` page | Server component listing soft-deleted profiles for the current user, read-only, URL hidden. | Impl | TASK-05, TASK-07 |
| SKIPPED | TASK-11 | E2E tests for profile management flow | Playwright specs for happy path (create/copy/edit-stable-url/regenerate/archive), auth redirect, validation errors, archived view. | Test | TASK-08, TASK-09, TASK-10 |
